zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Hansard於1486年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，她的父親Anthony Hansard9歲，母親Agnes Lovell8歲。她於1519年與Thomas Barnes在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1548年在英國素福爾可巴爾金享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Hansard于1486年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可时，她的父亲Anthony Hansard9岁，母亲Agnes Lovell8岁。她于1519年与Thomas Barnes在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1548年在英国素福爾可巴爾金享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hansard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): of Norman origin, from the Middle English and Old French personal name Ansard with prosthetic H-; from ancient Germanic ans- ‘(pagan) god’ + ward ‘guard, protector’ or hard- ‘brave, hardy’.

variants.name: Hazard
meanings: English: Anglo-Norman French variant of   Hansard  .

English and French: nickname from Old French, Middle English hasard, hazard ‘game of dice’, perhaps given to a player at hazard, i.e. a gambler, trickster, or rascal. The word probably derives from Arabic az-zahr, from az, assimilated form of the definite article al, + zahr ‘die’. It appears to have been picked up in the Holy Land and brought back to Europe by Provençal crusaders.
English: possibly in some instances of Flemish origin, a nickname from Middle Dutch hasart ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Hansard was born in 1486, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Anthony Hansard, was 9 and her mother, Agnes Lovell, was 8. She married Thomas Barnes in 1519, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1548, in Barking, Suffolk, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Hansard est née en 1486, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Anthony Hansard, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Agnes Lovell, avait 8 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Barnes en 1519, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1548, à Barking, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Hansardが1486年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Anthony Hansardは9歳，母Agnes Lovellは8歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでThomas Barnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1548年にイギリススフォルクバーキングで62歳で死去した。

ko.Barking, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 바킨그 앤드 다겐함
ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Hansard(이)가 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anthony Hansard(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Lovell(은)는 8세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Thomas Barnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1548년 영국 수폴크 바킨그에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Barking, London, England: баркинг анд дадженам, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Hansard родилась в 1486 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Anthony Hansard было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Lovell, 8. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Barnes в 1519 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1548 г. в местности баркинг, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.
